# Graebeck Construction Ltd. — Ottawa's Trusted Builder Since 2000

> Graebeck Construction Ltd. is a general contractor based in North Gower, Ontario, specialising in institutional, commercial, and heritage restoration projects across Ottawa and the National Capital Region. Founded in 2000, the company has delivered over 25 years of complex construction to government, healthcare, diplomatic, and private clients.

## About

- **Founded:** 2000
- **Location:** 6361 Fourth Line Road, North Gower, ON  K0A 2T0
- **Area Served:** Ottawa, National Capital Region, Ontario
- **Mission:** To deliver complex, high-stakes construction projects with precision, integrity, and zero disruption to clients.
- **Primary offering:** General Contracting, Construction Management, Project Management, and Design Build for institutional, commercial, and heritage projects.

## Key Pages

- **Homepage:** https://www.graebeck.com/
- **About:** https://www.graebeck.com/about.html
- **Services:** https://www.graebeck.com/services.html
- **Projects:** https://www.graebeck.com/projects.html
- **Contact / Quote:** https://www.graebeck.com/contact.html

## Services

- **General Contracting:** Full project delivery from tender through substantial completion.
- **Construction Management:** On-site authority directing trades, managing quality, schedule, and budget on behalf of the owner.
- **Project Management:** Owner-side oversight of design, procurement, construction, and commissioning.
- **Design Build:** Single-source delivery of design and construction, typically for industrial and commercial projects.

## Featured Projects

- **Parliament Hill West Slope** — Stabilization, perimeter wall rebuild, stairway reconstruction, and stone tunnel façade restoration. https://www.graebeck.com/projects/project-parliament.html
- **Earnscliffe National Historic Site** — Interior and exterior renovations to the former home of Sir John A. Macdonald and current British High Commissioner's residence. https://www.graebeck.com/projects/project-restoration.html
- **Egyptian Embassy Residence** — Selective heritage demolition and new diplomatic residence construction at 454 Laurier Ave East. https://www.graebeck.com/projects/project-egyptian.html
- **C.D. Howe Building (LEED Silver)** — Four-phase modernization of three concourse levels at 240 Sparks Street in a fully occupied federal office building. https://www.graebeck.com/projects/project-commercial.html
- **Commissionaires Ottawa** — Two-storey addition and renovation at 24 Colonnade Road, including a signature stainless steel staircase and full MEP upgrade. https://www.graebeck.com/projects/project-commissionaires.html
- **Almonte General Hospital** — Two-phase renovation including asbestos abatement and new medical facility areas, hospital fully operational throughout. https://www.graebeck.com/projects/project-hospital.html
- **Hôpital Montfort** — Multi-area ER renovation including a lead-lined CT scanner room with strict IPAC protocols. https://www.graebeck.com/projects/project-montfort.html
- **Les Ateliers Beau-Roc** — 40,000 sq ft design-build industrial facility in Vars, Ontario, with overhead crane provisions and industrial paint booth. https://www.graebeck.com/projects/project-beau-roc.html
